title: Enovix Corporation (ENVX) Stock: Q1 Revenue Rises 49% as Investors Watch Cash Burn
text: Revenue Growth vs. Market Concerns: Enovix delivered impressive top-line results with Q1 2026 revenue reaching $7.6 million, representing a 49% year-over-year increase. The company exceeded guidance expectations, driven largely by stronger shipments in defense and industrial markets. However, this positive performance failed to offset investor concerns about operational efficiency. Cash Burn Takes Center Stage: Operating cash burn increased to $33.1 million from $16.9 million in the prior year, while free cash flow deteriorated to a negative $36.3 million versus negative $23.2 million previously. Despite maintaining $582.7 million in liquidity, this acceleration in cash consumption weighed heavily on post-market sentiment. Stock Reaction: ENVX closed at $7.29 (up 4.59%) during regular trading but declined sharply to $6.33 (down 13.17%) in after-hours trading—a concerning reversal that reflected market prioritization of cash burn over revenue growth.
